topics.question: Two metal balls are the same size, but one weighs twice as much as the other. When dropped from the roof of a building at the same time, does the heavier ball reach the ground faster, slower, or at the same time as the lighter ball? Explain.
A driver goes from city A to city B at 30 mph, then drives back from B to A at 60 mph. What is the driver's average speed for the whole trip? Explain.

topics.topic: Where a tree's mass comes from
topics.question: A tiny seed is planted in a pot of soil. Over many years it grows into a large tree. Where does most of the tree's mass come from? Explain.
Why do temperatures stay warmer on a cloudy night than on a clear night? Explain
An iron nail is left outside and slowly rusts. Does the rusted nail weigh more, less, or the same as before? Explain.
